requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest Saturday afternoon special exhibition ticket under $20 per adult
requirements.task_description: Use the Tickets section to find special exhibition time slots on the upcoming Saturday afternoon, filter tickets so the maximum price per adult ticket is $20, sort by price, and proceed to checkout with exactly 2 adult tickets for the cheapest available slot.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing the filtered result list, when searchExhibitionTicketSlots is called with timeOfDay === 'afternoon', sortBy === 'price_low_to_high', typeof maxAdultPrice === 'number' and maxAdultPrice <= 20, and exhibitionTypes is an array that includes 'special_exhibition'.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the filter invocation and result summary, e.g. { date, exhibitionTypes, timeOfDay, maxAdultPrice, sortBy, onlyAvailable, resultCount: result.length }, where fields are taken from the function arguments and result is the filtered slots array before mapping.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that the user searched for special exhibition tickets on the chosen date using the correct afternoon time-of-day, max adult price $20, and sorted by price low-to-high, rather than inferring solely from the final booking.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-exhibition free family visit plan for the next 7 days
requirements.task_description: Use the Exhibitions section to find free, family-friendly exhibitions starting within the next 7 days, sort them by start date, and add the first three exhibitions in the list to a visit plan or favorites section.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing the filtered result list, when searchExhibitions is called with isFamilyFriendly === true, admissionTypes is an array that includes 'free', and sortBy === 'start_date_soonest_first'. (startDate and endDate are recorded as passed; evaluator will check that they correspond to today and 7 days from today.)
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { startDate, endDate, admissionTypes, isFamilyFriendly, sortBy, resultCount: result.length }, using the function arguments and the length of the filtered exhibitions array before mapping.
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user ran an Exhibitions search using free-admission + family-friendly filters and sorted by start date (soonest first), which cannot be inferred from visit_plan_items alone.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getVisitPlan is successfully called (i.e., the function returns the visit plan and its items).
required_variables.reason: Indicates that the user opened the 'My Visit Plan' / favorites page showing saved exhibitions, as required in the final step of the task. This page view is not represented in any existing storage.

requirements.task_name: Register 1 adult and 1 teen for an evening workshop under $60 total
requirements.task_description: Use the Events & Workshops section to find an evening workshop on May 20 of the current year, filter to workshops costing no more than $30 per ticket, and register for 1 adult and 1 teen ticket using a pay-on-arrival option.

required_variables.set_condition: After computing the filtered result list, when searchEventsAndWorkshops is called with timeOfDay === 'evening', typeof maxPricePerTicket === 'number' and maxPricePerTicket <= 30, and eventTypes is an array that includes 'workshop'. (The date argument is recorded as-is; the evaluator will verify it corresponds to May 20 of the current year.)
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { date, timeOfDay, maxPricePerTicket, eventTypes, sortBy, resultCount: filtered.length }, based on the function arguments and the filtered events array before mapping.
required_variables.reason: Captures that the user searched for evening workshops with a max price per ticket of $30, which is required by the task but cannot be deduced from registration records alone.

requirements.task_name: Add 3 highly rated postcards under $5 each to the cart
requirements.task_description: Use the Shop section to find postcard items that cost no more than $5 and have at least a 4-star rating, sort them by rating, add the first three distinct postcards to the cart, and set the quantity of each to 1.

required_variables.set_condition: After applying filters/sorting in searchProducts, when called with categoryKey === 'postcards_prints', typeof maxPrice === 'number' and maxPrice <= 5, typeof minRating === 'number' and minRating >= 4, and sortBy === 'customer_rating_high_to_low'.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { categoryKey, maxPrice, minRating, sortBy, onlyAvailable, resultCount: filtered.length }, using the function arguments and the filtered products array before mapping.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user searched within the 'Postcards & Prints' category using a max price of $5, min rating of 4+, and sorted by customer rating, as required by the task.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getCart is called and returns the current cart state (regardless of whether the cart has items).
required_variables.reason: Indicates that the user opened the cart page to review and adjust quantities, satisfying the step 'Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page.' There is no existing variable that records this page view.

requirements.task_name: Make a one-time $25 donation to the Artwork Conservation Fund
requirements.task_description: Use the Support/Donate section to select the Artwork Conservation Fund, enter a one-time donation amount of exactly $25, fill in donor details, choose credit card as payment method, and submit the donation form.

requirements.task_name: Purchase the cheapest annual student membership under $60
requirements.task_description: Use the Membership section to filter for student/youth memberships that cost no more than $60 per year, sort them by price, choose the cheapest one, fill in basic details, and proceed to the payment step.

required_variables.set_condition: After filtering/sorting in searchMembershipPlans, when called with membershipType === 'student_youth', typeof maxAnnualPrice === 'number' and maxAnnualPrice <= 60, and sortBy === 'price_low_to_high'. (billingFrequency is recorded as provided; evaluator can check that it is annual if required.)
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { membershipType, maxAnnualPrice, billingFrequency, sortBy, resultCount: plans.length }, where plans is the filtered array before mapping.
required_variables.reason: Captures that the user searched for student/youth memberships with an annual price cap of $60 and sorted by lowest price first, as required by the task instructions.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the gallery newsletter with specific content preferences
requirements.task_description: Use the newsletter form (e.g., in the footer) to subscribe with an email address, select the "Monthly highlights" and "New exhibitions & openings" topics, choose HTML email format, and submit the subscription.

requirements.task_name: Book a weekday morning wheelchair-accessible guided tour for 5 visitors
requirements.task_description: Use the Visit/Guided Tours section to find weekday morning tours between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM, filter for wheelchair-accessible tours, select the first matching tour, and proceed to checkout with a booking for 5 visitors in English.

required_variables.set_condition: After building the result array in searchGuidedTourSchedules, when called with dayType === 'weekday', timeOfDay === 'morning', and isWheelchairAccessibleRoute === true. (language, startDate, and endDate are recorded as passed and evaluated later.)
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { tourId, startDate, endDate, dayType, timeOfDay, isWheelchairAccessibleRoute, language, resultCount: result.length }, where result is the filtered schedules array before sorting/mapping.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user searched for weekday morning wheelchair-accessible guided tours, which is required by the task but not otherwise visible from the final booking data.
